detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Vault.withdraw(uint256) (contracts/Vault.sol#24-29):
	External calls:
	- (ok,None) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}() (contracts/Vault.sol#26)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] -= amount (contracts/Vault.sol#28)
	Vault.balances (contracts/Vault.sol#12) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Vault.balances (contracts/Vault.sol#12)
	- Vault.claimBonus() (contracts/Vault.sol#38-42)
	- Vault.deposit() (contracts/Vault.sol#19-21)
	- Vault.withdraw(uint256) (contracts/Vault.sol#24-29)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Vault.withdraw(uint256)](contracts/Vault.sol#L24-L29):
	External calls:
	- [(ok,None) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}()](contracts/Vault.sol#L26)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [balances[msg.sender] -= amount](contracts/Vault.sol#L28)
	[Vault.balances](contracts/Vault.sol#L12) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Vault.balances](contracts/Vault.sol#L12)
	- [Vault.claimBonus()](contracts/Vault.sol#L38-L42)
	- [Vault.deposit()](contracts/Vault.sol#L19-L21)
	- [Vault.withdraw(uint256)](contracts/Vault.sol#L24-L29)

detectors.description: Vault.setOwner(address) (contracts/Vault.sol#32-35) uses tx.origin for authorization: require(bool,string)(tx.origin == owner,not owner) (contracts/Vault.sol#33)
detectors.markdown: [Vault.setOwner(address)](contracts/Vault.sol#L32-L35) uses tx.origin for authorization: [require(bool,string)(tx.origin == owner,not owner)](contracts/Vault.sol#L33)

detectors.description: Vault.adminCall(address,bytes) (contracts/Vault.sol#45-48) ignores return value by target.call(data) (contracts/Vault.sol#47)

Vault.adminCall(address,bytes).target (contracts/Vault.sol#45) lacks a zero-check on :
		- target.call(data) (contracts/Vault.sol#47)

Vault.setOwner(address).newOwner (contracts/Vault.sol#32) lacks a zero-check on :
		- owner = newOwner (contracts/Vault.sol#34)

Vault.claimBonus() (contracts/Vault.sol#38-42) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(block.timestamp - lastClaim[msg.sender] > 86400,too soon) (contracts/Vault.sol#39)
detectors.markdown:
[Vault.claimBonus()](contracts/Vault.sol#L38-L42) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- [require(bool,string)(block.timestamp - lastClaim[msg.sender] > 86400,too soon)](contracts/Vault.sol#L39)
